mapper.select: SELECT tor.instructor_name, tor.teaching_years, tor.photo, tor.good_subject, tor.score, car.car_id, car.car_name, car.`status`, car.plate_number, car.car_color FROM driving_instructor AS tor LEFT JOIN driving_car AS car ON tor.instructor_id = car.instructor_id WHERE tor.`status` = '0' AND car.`status` = '0' LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM driving_appointment apo WHERE apo.del_flag = '2'

SELECT app.appointment_id, app.start_time, app.end_time, app.`status`, stu.student_name, stu.student_id, stu.phone, stu.create_time, ins.instructor_id, ins.instructor_name, car.car_id, car.car_name, car.plate_number, loc.location_id, loc.location_name, sub.subject_id, sub.subject_name, sub.tag FROM driving_appointment AS app LEFT JOIN driving_student AS stu ON app.student_id = stu.student_id LEFT JOIN driving_instructor AS ins ON app.instructor_id = ins.instructor_id LEFT JOIN driving_car AS car ON car.instructor_id = ins.instructor_id LEFT JOIN driving_location AS loc ON app.appointment_id = loc.location_id LEFT JOIN driving_subject AS sub ON sub.subject_id = app.subject_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT app.appointment_id, app.start_time, app.end_time, app.`status`, stu.student_name, stu.student_id, stu.phone, stu.create_time, ins.instructor_id, ins.instructor_name, car.car_id, car.car_name, car.plate_number, loc.location_id, loc.location_name, sub.subject_id, sub.subject_name, sub.tag FROM driving_appointment AS app LEFT JOIN driving_student AS stu ON app.student_id = stu.student_id LEFT JOIN driving_instructor AS ins ON app.instructor_id = ins.instructor_id LEFT JOIN driving_car AS car ON car.instructor_id = ins.instructor_id LEFT JOIN driving_location AS loc ON app.appointment_id = loc.location_id LEFT JOIN driving_subject AS sub ON sub.subject_id = app.subject_id where app.appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
